result:
Both changes were already applied before this session. Summary:

**`processes-api.test.ts`** — `RecordingPlatformStore` gained `upsertProcessEnvironmentState` (typed via `EnvironmentSummary` import) returning a spread of `defaultEnvironmentSummary` with caller-supplied fields.

**`auth-routes.test.ts`** — inline `PlatformStore` object literal gained the same method (no explicit type annotation needed since the object is structurally typed).

`tsc --noEmit` exits 0. Report written to `story-verification/02-start-or-resume-with-environment-preparation/impl-slice2-report.md`.
